 ## Strategy

 ## Metrics Tracking
@@ -13,15 +14,14 @@

 - Week 4: 27 subs.

 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- Targeted dev/ops spend was much higher than expected ($19k/week). RESET.

+- Search ads for S1 are working (~$67 CAC).
